description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow set within a landscaped plot bordered by rows of palm trees and larger deciduous trees at the corners. The structure features a flat roof with multiple sections, including a central open courtyard and several glass-covered areas, likely serving as sunrooms or patios. The front facade is defined by a wide entrance pathway flanked by lush greenery and a low fence, leading to a main door. Large windows and sliding glass doors are distributed asymmetrically, maximizing natural light and providing views of the surrounding gardens. The property includes a driveway and what appears to be a carport or garage on one side, as well as outdoor seating and recreational spaces. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with the outdoor environment.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped surroundings, featuring open courtyards and glass-covered patios. The property is bordered by palm trees and includes a driveway, garden, and outdoor living areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, landscaped pathway, and symmetrical rows of palm trees leading up to the bungalow.
description_view_1: Rear-side view highlighting the open courtyard, glass-covered patio, and the driveway area with visible garden landscaping.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the rear garden, additional outdoor spaces, and the full extent of the flat roof and window arrangement.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the carport or garage, side garden, and the integration of greenery with the building's modern lines.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
